title: Lahu-parivatta Sutta
subtitle: Quick to Reverse Itself
pageTitle: Lahu-parivatta Sutta: Quick to Reverse Itself
author: Thanissaro Bhikkhu
contentHtml: "I don't envision a single thing that is as quick to reverse itself as the mind — so much so that there is no feasible simile for how quick to reverse itself it is."
summary: The Buddha, normally so adept at finding similes, is here at a loss.
